title: Decision #112 on the Creation of an Inter-Ministerial Commission for the Preparation and Organization of Import and Export Procedures and Regulations_940919
title_en: Decision #112 on the Creation of an Inter-Ministerial Commission for the Preparation and Organization of Import and Export Procedures and Regulations_940919
short_name: Decision #112 on the Creation of an Inter-Ministerial Com...

provisions.content:
To create an inter-ministerial commission for the preparation and organization of import and export

procedures and regulations. The composition of the commission shall be as follows:

1. H.E. Kiet Chhon Chairman

2. H.E. Ing Kiet Member

3. H.E. Pou Sothirak Member

4. H.E. Var Huot Member

5. H.E. Cham Prasiddh Member

6. H.E. Ek Sereyvuth Member

7. H.E. Im ChhunLim Member

8. H.E. Ith Vichit Member

9. H.E. Chheang Yanara Permanent Member

The roles and responsibilities of the commission shall be as follows:

1. To prepare a draft Sub-Decree on import and export procedures and regulations of the Kingdom of

Cambodia and to submit them to the Cabinet of the Council of Ministers.

2. The substance of such draft shall concentrate on the followings:
• import and export procedures and regulations of equipment, raw materials, spare parts, etc. of
companies and investors to ensure the safety and timing.
• to set up the roles and responsibilities of the customs and the relevant authorities at Sihanoukville and
Phnom Penh ports and the Pochentong Airport, as well as all other border check-points.
• to determine the deadline for submitting import and export procedures and regulations of equipment,
raw materials, spare parts, etc. of companies and investors the customs and the relevant authorities at
seaports, airports, as well as all other border check-points.

In the event of unreasonable and without cause delay, the individual concerned shall be fined in

according to the law in force.

3. In order to ensure security and order, to set up measures to eradicate illegal check-points along

national roads, and prevent harassment and extortion of vehicle owners on national roads, especially on

NR No 04.

4. to set up measures to defend and maintain railways from Phnom Penh to Preah Sihanoukville in

order to substitute National Road No 4 to be repaired in the future.

5. to study and prepare project for constructions of dry ports, and appoint agents in charge of

collecting fees at the sea ports, airports and border check-points.

All members of this commission shall participate in meetings at the request of the Chairman.

This commission shall have the right to use the seal of the Council for the Development of Cambodia.

The Co-Ministers in charge of the Cabinet of the Council of Ministers, the Co-ministers of Interior, the

Minister of Defense, the Minister of Public Works and Transports, the Minister of Economy and

Finances, the Minister of Industry, Mines and Energy, the Minister of Commerce, the Council for the

Development of Cambodia, and all the personalities mentioned in Article 1 shall implement this

Decision from the date of its signature.

The First Prime Minister

Royal Signature and Seal

NORODOM RANARIDDH
